chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-1189 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 25.03.2026 Mr. Athar Hussian Abro, Advocate for petitioner Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant A.G Sindh Mr. Miran Bux Shar, Advocate for respondents No.2&4. ************** Counsel for respondents No.2&4 has filed a statement/compliance report; the same is taken on record. Learned counsel for respondents No.2&4, the Municipal Committee Khairpur, submits that the entire remaining salaries have been paid to the petitioner, and the present petition has become infructuous. Since grievance of the petitioner has been redressed, therefore, instant constitutional petition, having become infructuous, stands disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E M.Ali*
